Medicare payments are designed to include certain "pass-through" expenses such as capital-related 
costs, direct medical education costs, kidney acquisition costs for hospitals that are renal transplant 
centers, and bad debts. This variable is the sum of all the daily payments for pass-through expenses. It is 
not included in the Medicare Payment amount (ACUTE_MDCR_PMT). To determine the total Medicare 
payments for acute hospitalizations for the beneficiary, this field must be added to
